{{CargoRelic
|name=Effective Manager
|class_id=20092
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This book is written by the world-renowned management master Peter Dracker. In the book, he not only redefined the concept of a manager, but also put forward a large number of classic and practical management ideas. The publication of this book announced the birth of the discipline of management and profoundly impacted later generations.
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=30
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br> (Awakened)
}}
